main.description: A declaration of a Germ Network account. Binds an ATProto DID to a device-bound Anchor Key for E2EE messaging via the Germ protocol. Models after Germ's current shipping 1:1 E2EE DM product.

version.description: Semver version number, without pre-release or build information, for the format of opaque content

currentKey.description: Opaque value, an ed25519 public key prefixed with a byte enum

messageMe.description: Controls who can message this account

keyPackage.description: Opaque value, contains MLS KeyPackage(s), and other signature data, and is signed by the currentKey

continuityProofs.description: Array of opaque values to allow for key rolling

messageMeUrl.description: A URL to present to an account that does not have its own com.germnetwork.declaration record, must have an empty fragment component, where the app should fill in the fragment component with the DIDs of the two accounts who wish to message each other

showButtonTo.description: The policy of who can message the account, this value is included in the keyPackage, but is duplicated here to allow applications to decide if they should show a 'Message on Germ' button to the viewer.
